name: Imperator's Fury
desc: Certain legions among the Hundred, such as the Imperators of the 77th, include members who implant physiologically altering stakes into their bodies as a part of a sacred vow to enhance their physical abilities. By embedding such a stake, they willingly sacrifice a part of themselves in exchange for heightened strength and abilities. Though this concept isn't unilaterally accepted amongst the legions as an appropriate way to acquire strength.
